## Summary
I've successfully updated the test assertion strings in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/fakes/test_fake_command_executor.py`:

Both occurrences of `"Closed plan #456"` have been replaced with `"Closed PR #456"` using `replace_all=true`, ensuring consistency with the source code changes.

#### 2. Unit Tests (erk) - 22 Failures All failures are assertion errors related to expected strings in output. These failures appear to be from recent changes to help strings and terminology (the branch is `plnd/O9109-update-help-strings-03-10-0937`). | Test File | Failure Pattern | | `tests/unit/cli/commands/test_admin_test_workflow.py` (2 failures) | Expected 'Created test plan' but got 'Created test PR' | | `tests/commands/admin/test_plan_implement_workflow.py` (1 failure) | Expected 'Created test plan' but got 'Created test PR' | | `tests/commands/branch/test_checkout_cmd.py` (3 failures) | Expected 'Created .erk/impl-context/ folder from plan' but got 'from PR' | | `tests/commands/consolidate_learn_plans/test_dispatch.py` (1 failure) | Expected 'Consolidate learn plans' but got 'Consolidate learn PRs' | | `tests/commands/pr/test_create.py` (1 failure) | Expected 'Checkout PR' string not found in output | | Additional failures in other test files | Similar assertion mismatches | The failures are directly related to the branch's objective (O9109) of updating help strings and error messages. The test assertions need to be updated to match the new terminology in the implementation.

1. Source already says `"Created test PR #{plan_number}"` but tests expect `"Created test plan #1"` - need to update tests 2. Source already says `"Created .erk/impl-context/ folder from PR #{setup.plan_number}"` but tests expect `"from plan #123"` - need to update tests 3. session.assistant:
The `pr_title` was changed to `"Consolidate learn PRs"` but the git commit message on line 132 still says `"Consolidate learn plans"`. The test checks `pr.title` which is the PR title, not the commit message. So the test should expect `"Consolidate learn PRs"`.
Also, line 132 commit message should be updated too. Let me also check what the test_create.py failure is about - it says "Checkout PR #999" not found in output:
